description: Browser embodiment contract. Provides typed perception of web DOM state (a11y tree + URL), typed action execution (click, fill, type, navigate, upload, etc.), affordance enumeration over currently-interactive elements, and deterministic state hashing for replay. The canonical `&body.*` subtype for agents that live on the web.

perceive.description: Capture current browser state as a structured observation: URL, a11y tree, interactive element refs (e.g. @e1, @e2), document metadata. Refs become stale on navigation or re-render; callers MUST re-perceive before re-acting.

act.description: Execute a single typed browser action against a ref or semantic locator. Action types: click, dblclick, hover, focus, fill, type, press, check, uncheck, select, upload, scroll, scrollintoview, drag, navigate, wait, screenshot. Emits an action_outcome with before/after state hashes for InteractionTrace construction.

affordances.description: Enumerate the typed actions currently available in the present browser state, optionally scoped to a ref or selector. Returns an action_set describing what is clickable, fillable, selectable, navigable, etc. right now. This is the Gibson-style affordance interface: not every tool is available in every state.

encode_state.description: Produce a deterministic hash of the current browser state (url + a11y-tree-structure + viewport). Used as FSM state identity: if two perceptions hash equal, the stored action sequence from that state is replayable.

replay.description: Execute a stored InteractionTrace against the current browser. Trace conforms to the OS-011 InteractionTrace schema. Replay fails fast if the starting state_hash does not match the trace's recorded starting state, or if any intermediate state_hash diverges (indicating environment drift).

metadata.ref_model: snapshot assigns fresh @eN refs per perceive(); refs stale on navigation or re-render; re-perceive required
metadata.session_persistence: supports cookies/localStorage save-restore for multi-run continuity
example_use_cases: continual-learning agent dogfooding its own web UI
skill crystallization: successful web-task trace promoted to FleetPrompt SkillCandidate
cross-machine skill transfer: one agent learns a workflow, another replays it
